dialogueChunks.intro: Our people are desperate, {player_name}. And the ones stepping up to help them are willing to pay with their lives.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} pushed us to the edge. Volunteers have offered to {quest_action} knowing the odds are against them. The road passes through {enemy_type} territory. Those volunteers aren't fighters: they're family who decided protecting {quest_stakes_the} matters more than their own safety. {quest_item} {location_hint} could help even the odds.
dialogueChunks.outro: They leave at dawn. {quest_threat_The} will be waiting somewhere along the way. Help me make sure their courage isn't wasted.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_focus_The} won't hold much longer, {player_name}, and everything downstream: homes, farms, families, is in the path.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone volunteered to go into danger and shore up {quest_focus_the} with their own hands. They know that if it fails while they're there, they're gone. Their family begged them not to go. They said: 'Those are our neighbors down the hill.' They can't do it alone. We need someone to {quest_action} while they do the dangerous work.
dialogueChunks.outro: Saving {quest_stakes_the} depends on whether the effort holds. {quest_item} {location_hint} could make the difference.

dialogueChunks.intro: People are on the road right now, walking with everything they own on their backs. Behind them, the {enemy_type_plural} are burning what's left.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone stayed behind to buy time. They're pretending to be a garrison all by themselves. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} maybe half a day's lead, and the road ahead isn't clear. We need someone to {quest_action} so {quest_stakes_the} can reach safety. Before {quest_time_pressure}.
dialogueChunks.outro: That person is giving everything they have left so their people can walk a little further. {quest_reward_hint} might come of reaching safety.
